## How to Review

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` completes without errors
- [ ] Slides render correctly in dev server
- [ ] Speaker notes are accurate
- [ ] No broken layouts or overlapping elements
- [ ] Progressive reveals (v-clicks) work as intended
